name: NostrWalletConnect
summary: Nostr Wallet Connect (NIP-47) SDK for AI entities — pay Lightning invoices, check balance, create invoices via any NWC-compatible wallet

env.name: NWC_CONNECTION_STRING
env.description: nostr+walletconnect:// URI from your NWC-compatible wallet — contains wallet pubkey, relay URL, and secret key

env.name: NWC_TIMEOUT
env.description: Request timeout in seconds for wallet responses

env.name: NOSTRKEY_PASSPHRASE
env.description: Passphrase for the NostrKey identity (used by the nostrkey dependency for key operations)
